Notice And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint (Motions)
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SUNG WOO CHOI, Esq. of Logos Professional Law Corporation (Tel: 213-814-2442) for plaintiffs;
Atty. DAVID B. BURNETT, Esq. of Resnick & Louis, P.C. (Tel: 714-709-4400) for defendant Kevin Primat.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS TONY HWANG and MAL KIM's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

The Court confirms with counsel for parties that the parties have reached an agreement as to this motion.

The Court instructs the parties to submit a stipulated proposed order to the Court for review and signature.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Continued To May-25-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KEVIN PRIMAT MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT

Kevin Primat's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the amended complaint is now due by April 28, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
